title: pre-flight.yml
description: Homelab stack pre-deployment requirements. Read by the preflight Ansible role before docker stack deploy.

secrets.description: Docker Swarm secrets to create before deploying. Idempotent — skipped if the secret already exists.

from_env.description: Name of the .env variable whose value becomes the secret data

from_file.description: Path to a file whose contents become the secret data. Use $VAR to reference a .env variable as the path.

validate.description: Pre-deployment validation checks. Ansible fails with a clear message if any check fails.

env.description: Environment variable names that must be non-empty in .env before deploying.

labels.description: Node labels — at least one Swarm node must carry each label before deploying.
